package rulefixtures

import (
	"database/sql"
	"fmt"
)

// scenario for sql_string_concat: Query execution calls where SQL is constructed dynamically with concatenation or fmt.Sprintf.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario734Positive(db *sql.DB, userInput string) (*sql.Rows, error) {
	query := "select * from users where name = '" + userInput + "'"
	_ = fmt.Sprintf("(&(uid=%s))", userInput)
	return db.Query(query)
}
